title: Enchanting Templates
description: Add Enchanting Templates - A method to smithing and duplicating enchantments!
body:
# Enchanting Templates

Combining smithing template and enchanted books, this mod adds a new item: Enchanting Template.

## Features

- Add enchantment (only one) to tools and armors through the smithing table with an amethyst shard.

![Template in use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4484100f5e781c3e5764617442d7a6821810ec5.png)

- The templates can be duplicated like regular smithing templates, with a block of emerald and 7 diamonds.

![Template duplication](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca11cf9abb2599fe56a02ac82048a8837347fac5.png)

- Can only be found in loot chests where enchanted books are.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ee659761aa499f47599cf72f5fe0448269f8543.png)

- The templates only hold one enchantment each, which can't be combined.
